title: Flow Designer / Workflow Studio
summary: No-code/low-code automation on the Now Platform: flows, subflows, actions, triggers, flow logic, decision tables, data pills, and spokes (IntegrationHub). Workflow Studio is the centralized automation hub over the flow engine.

title: App Engine Studio / Application Studio
summary: Low-code (AES) and pro-code (Studio) building of scoped applications: tables/fields, forms/questions, experiences/UI, flows/playbooks, roles, templates, and governance via App Engine Management Center (AEMC).

title: Integrated Risk Management (IRM / GRC)
summary: GRC suite: Policy & Compliance, Risk Management, Advanced Risk, Profiles, Vendor/TPRM, Privacy, and Audit. Entity/profile framework, risk lifecycle, controls & attestation, indicators, and continuous monitoring; scoped tables (sn_risk_*, sn_compliance_*, sn_audit_*, sn_vdr_*).

title: Security Operations (SecOps)
summary: SOAR engine on the Now Platform: Security Incident Response, Vulnerability Response, Configuration Compliance, and Threat Intelligence. Playbooks, CMDB correlation, MITRE ATT&CK, and deep IT collaboration; scoped tables (sn_si_*, sn_vul_*).
